prs.title: Fix#10022 request time limits
Prepare for release: v5.6.1
Replace remaining deprecated datetime.utcnow() calls
fix(worker): add hub.reset() to synloop on connection error
Prepare for release: v5.6.3
v5.6.3 commits
fix: clear the timer while catch the exception
Add Google Cloud PubSub dependency group
Only use exceptiongroup backport for Python < 3.11
Stop importing pytest_subtests
Add `__class_getitem__` to generic classes
better coverage
reliable prefork detection
Fix: prioritize request ignore_result over task definition
docs: fix duplicated word in bootsteps comment
Remove outdated autoreloader section from extending docs
Add compression header to message protocol docs
Add exists() method to AsyncResult
docs: clarify after_return behavior for retried tasks
Fix#9722 friendly status errors for CLI
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
pep 649
Extract `reconnect_on_error` to `BaseResultConsumer`
fix(trace): dispatch chain/callbacks on dedup fast-path for redelivered tasks
Fix: Avoid unnecessary Django database connection creation during cleanup
close DB pools only in prefork mode
Fix NameError with TYPE_CHECKING annotations on Python 3.14+ (PEP 649)
Fix mock connection interfaces to prevent `TypeError` during exception handling
Fix O(K²) message bloat in a chain of chords
docs: Add elaboration on prefetch multiplier settings (worker_prefetch_multiplier) and worker_eta_task_limit
Fix #6912 rpc backend reconnection error
Fix: Broker heartbeats not sent during graceful shutdown
Fix Redis Sentinel ACL authentication support
Add redis-py DriverInfo support to Redis backend
Remove deprecated args from redis get_connection call
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Upgrade pytest-celery to >=1.3.0 and adopt PYTEST_CELERY_PKG build arg
Remove redundant test_isa_mapping test (fixes #10077)
Database Backend Should Support the retry config parameters #6540
fix: avoid cycle detection in native delayed delivery (#10095)
Add non-commutative example to clarify partial arg ordering in canvas docs
Improve on_after_finalize signal documentation
Fix/10096 worker fails to reconnect after redis failover
Removed --dist=loadscope from smoke tests
Prepare for release: v5.6.0
docs: fix changelog typo in context manager wording
feat(task): decouple acks_on_failure and acks_on_timeout
docs: fix duplicated wording in 3.1 changelog entry
docs: fix wording in Celery 5.3 worker pool notes
docs: fix stale version reference and grammar in README
docs: remove duplicated words in broker and routing docs
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Refer to Flower / Prometheus for monitoring
docs: fix typo in CONTRIBUTING.rst
fix: avoid cycle detection in native delayed delivery
Database Backend: Add missing index on date_done (Fixes #10097)
chore: 'boto3to' to 'boto3 to'
ci: declare explicit read-only token permissions in workflow jobs
fix(beat): correct argument order in Service.__reduce__
Database Backend filter unsupport sql engine arguments with nullpool #7355
Prepare for (pre) release: v5.6.0rc2
asynpool: Don't return from inside a finally block
Fix 10109 db backend connection health
Add Py39-314t to CI
Don't fail task on timeout during cold shutdown
Fix warm shutdown RuntimeError with eventlet>=0.37.0 (#10083)
Fix/10106 onupdate col use lambda func
fix dusk_astronomical horizon sign (+18 -> -18)
fix(asynpool): avoid AttributeError when proc lacks _sentinel_poll
Sanitize broker URL in delayed delivery logs (avoid leaking credentials)
Remove Python 4.0 version condition for pytest dependencies
fix: register task cross-reference role in Sphinx extension
fix: source install of cassandra-driver
Update Python version requirement to 3.10
Revise Python compatibility for Celery versions
Remove Python 3.9 from Dockerfile
Make tests compatible with pymongo >= 4.16
Update Python and OS versions in Read the Docs config
Remove Python 3.9 from tox configuration
Update default Python versions in smoke-tests.yml
Update default Python versions in Integration test
Update CI matrix to exclude Python 3.9
Revert "Use Django DB max age connection setting"
Update example for Django
Prepare for (pre) release: v5.6.0rc1
Fix regex pattern in version parsing and remove duplicate entry in __all__
Docs: Clarify task_retry signal args may be None
Fix remaining function typing and docstring
Make tests compatible with pymongo >= 4.14
tblib updated from 3.1.0 to 3.2.0
Add support pymongo  4.12
Bug Fix: Nested Chords Fail When Using django-celery-results with a Redis Backend
fix(worker): continue to attempt to bind other queues after a native delayed delivery binding failure has occurred
Handle UnpicklingError in persistent scheduler initialization
Pin tblib to ==3.1.0
Remove broken reference.
Fix broken images on PyPI page
Add support for Django Connection pool
Prepare for (pre) release: v5.6.0b2
Update pytest-rerunfailures and pre-commit versions
Remove backports.zoneinfo for Python 3.9 compatibility
Update pytest-cov version for Python compatibility
Flake8 fixes
Fix recursive WorkController instantiation in DjangoWorkerFixup + AttributeError when pool_cls is a string
Fix invalid configuration key "bootstrap_servers" in Kafka demo
Docs: Update user_preload_options example to use click.
Update Python version requirement to 3.9
Update tox.ini to remove Python 3.8
Remove Python 3.8 from CI workflow
Revert "Update elasticsearch requirement from <=9.1.2 to <=9.2.1"
Fix Django worker recursion bug + defensive checks for pool_cls.__module__
Prepare for release: v5.6.2
Bugfix: Revoked tasks now immediately update backend status to REVOKED
Fix handlers docs (Issue #9787)
fix(): preserve group order in replaced signature
fix: restrict disable-prefetch feature to Redis brokers only
Fix broker connection retry attempt counter in the error log
Support redis client name
Add documentation for task_id param for apply_async function
Fix arithmetic overflow for MSSQL result backend
Celery.timezone: try tzlocal.get_localzone() before using LocalTimezone
Docs: clarify `result_extended` vs periodic task metadata and show `headers["periodic_task_name"]` example
Feature: Add support credential_provider to Redis Backend
Update pypy to python 3.11
GitHub Actions: Test on Python 3.14 release candidate 2
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Prepare for (pre) release: v5.6.0b1
docs #5410 -- Document confirm_publish broker transport option
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Add worker_eta_task_limit configuration to manage ETA task memory usage
Feature/disable prefetch fixes
fix: prevent celery from hanging due to spawned greenlet errors in greenlet drainers
Choose queue type and exchange type when creating missing queues (fix #9671)
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Fix `AsyncResult.forget()` with couchdb backend method raises `TypeError: a bytes-like object is required, not 'str'`
Refactor integration and smoke tests CI
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Update python-package.yml
Migrated from useblacksmith/build-push-action@v1 to useblacksmith/setup-docker-builder@v1 in the CI
Fix Python 3.13 compatibility in events dumper
Disable pytest-xdist for smoke tests and increase retries (CI ONLY)
Add Blacksmith Docker layer caching to all Docker builds
Remove test-pypy3.txt from Dockerfile dependencies
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate
Update pypy version from 3.10 to 3.11 in Dockerfile
Remove Python 3.8 from Dockerfile
Update default Python versions in integration tests
Revert "Remove dependency on `pycurl`"
Update timeout minutes for smoke tests CI
Remove importlib_metadata leftovers
Fix memory leak in exception handling (Issue #8882)
Fix #9794: Pydantic integration fails with __future__.annotations.
Replace DelayedDelivery connection creation to use context manger
Add `engine_callback` to database backend `SessionManager`
fix: send the task failure in hard timeout
feat: add global keyprefix for backend result keys
